services.heading: How it works

steps.title: 1. Send us your product
steps.text: Ship a sample and set an affiliate commission on TikTok Shop. Supplements and wellness products are our specialty — it's where our audience already buys.

steps.title: 2. We create review content
steps.text: Our creators produce review videos built around what actually converts on TikTok Shop — hooks, demos, and honest takes.

steps.title: 3. You watch GMV climb
steps.text: Content goes live across our network. You track every attributed sale in your own TikTok Shop dashboard — full transparency.

services.note: We work on commission. No retainers, no upfront fees — we only win when your product sells.

contact.heading: Work with us
contact.subheading: Tell us about your product. We reply to every serious brand within 24 hours.
